sentences.text: In their in their laws, in their policy, in their habits.
They they are you know, I'm I'm I'm not saying anything bad because because, you know, every every country, every nationality, have their own habits, their own tradition, I don't know.
Yes.
Yeah.
Has their own, habits, tradition, experiences, etcetera.
Right?
But but, you know, this is the you know, there is huge work ahead Ukraine to do to really build build a stable democracy.
I'm saying it because because I
I we we tested it in Poland every day.
You know, we had maybe 1 third of these difficulties at the beginning in the nineties.
Right?
And I know how difficult it is to reestablish or build new democracy, you know, to to to make it stable.
Right?
And, I mean, you you have to be very focused to not to lose the democracy.
And, so so so, you know, I'm I'm very happy.
I'm very gracious to to to Ukraine to Ukraine people.
Very grateful that that they they they the majority of them at least have this dream to join the the Western Europe, to to to join, you know.
But but if Western Europe is giving him them, the big fuck, And if Trump is giving them big fuck, they will change their mind instantly.
